title: Initial import: review scripts and runbooks
body:
Inspect the copied scripts/ and deploy/ folders, verify they run locally, and document any environment variables or credentials needed.

Acceptance criteria:
- Scripts run in a dev container or local shell
- README updated with run instructions
- Any secrets are noted and not committed

title: Add tests and linting for automation scripts
body:
Create lightweight tests (shellcheck, unit tests where applicable) and add linting to the CI workflow.

Acceptance criteria:
- shellcheck or equivalent added
- CI job runs lint and tests
- Documentation on how to run locally

title: Create container image and publish dev tag
body: Add Dockerfile and build/push workflow for a dev image tag. Ensure entrypoint.sh is used and documentation explains how to run the container locally.
